overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment. The player character walks through an indoor parking facility, passes an NPC talking on a phone, exits into a bright service corridor between high-rise buildings, and continues past industrial vehicles and workers. The setting features modern architecture with overhead walkways connecting buildings, and the atmosphere is that of a busy metropolitan service area.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit indoor parking facility with a futuristic sports car visible to the right. The camera moves forward past concrete pillars and stacks of industrial crates. A man in business attire stands near the crates talking on his phone, whom the camera passes closely before approaching the bright exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit ramp transitioning from indoor to outdoor service corridor

tall modern buildings with glass and concrete exteriors lining both sides

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the exit threshold, transitioning from the dim interior to a bright service corridor. The artificial lighting gives way to natural daylight as the scene opens into a wide concrete passage between towering modern buildings, with elevated walkways visible overhead.

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down the sunlit service corridor, passing under multiple overhead walkways connecting the buildings. A worker in a safety vest crosses the path from right to left. The corridor features industrial ventilation grills on the right wall and a distant service truck becomes visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes a large dump truck parked on the right, with a worker walking nearby. Continuing forward, the scene reveals an active work site where two workers in safety gear stand near a utility cart loaded with cargo. The overhead walkways now pass closely overhead as the camera nears the end of the corridor section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit indoor parking facility into a bright, bustling outdoor service corridor. It begins by gliding past concrete pillars and a futuristic sports car, passing a man in business attire talking on his phone before approaching a luminous exit. As the camera crosses the threshold, the dim interior lighting gives way to natural daylight, opening into a wide concrete passage flanked by towering modern buildings and elevated walkways. The scene then proceeds under these overhead structures, passing a worker in a safety vest and industrial ventilation grills before approaching a large parked dump truck. Finally, the camera moves past the vehicle toward an active work site where workers stand by a loaded utility cart beneath the looming architecture of the city.
